backend/main.mo: Defines an actor method that removes duplicate text lines using a Set and traps on empty input.
feature_evidence.json: Lists feature evidence metadata linking features to frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of each major frontend file.
frontend/index.css: Sets global Tailwind base styles and OKLCH color variables for light and dark comic-themed modes.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML file loading the React app via main.tsx with a descriptive title.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Wraps the app with theme and settings providers and renders header, controls, comic viewer, and footer.
frontend/src/components/ComicPanel.tsx: Reusable comic-style panel component with variant-based styling and pop-in animation.
frontend/src/components/ComicViewer.tsx: Displays deduplicated or original story panels and credits with stats and scrollable layout.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders footer with copyright, attribution links, and Spider-Man creator credits.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders comic-themed header with title, subtitle, and theme toggle button.
frontend/src/components/RepetitionRemova: UI control with label and switch to enable or disable text deduplication.
frontend/src/contexts/ComicSettingsConte: Context managing whether repetition removal is enabled and providing related setters.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that initializes and updates a backend actor based on user identity and manages query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and provider for Internet Identity authentication, handling identity loading, login, logout, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines a React Query mutation that calls the actor to deduplicate comic text and invalidates related queries on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Sets global Tailwind-based styles with a comic-inspired color theme, typography, and panel effects.
frontend/src/lib/deduplication.ts: Implements simple deduplication of text lines by keeping only the first occurrence of each line.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a utility function that merges class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider and renders the root component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom comic-style colors, typography, container settings, shadows, and plugins.
project_state.json: Describes the project’s state, including features, requirements, and a focus on preventing repeated comic dialogue.
